title: stelis micragrostis
intro: Stelis micragrostis, also known as the False Pogonia or False Adder's-mouth Orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, due to its bitter principles. The roots of Stelis micragrostis are used in herbal preparations to provide relief from these health issues, and are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or decoction, and is used to treat a range of health problems, from respiratory issues to skin conditions.
